title: OreUI Recreation - Dark mode
description: A darkened version of an amazing pack!
body:
# **Disclaimer!!** — This pack is based off of the [OreUI Recreation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oreui-recreation) by **tmc249**, and is not my original creation.
It's recommended to use [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) for all the custom coloured inventories to work.

Shulker box colour variations:

![Shulker box colour variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad8f0327a543f513e81f31089f49fa6a8544d61b.gif)

Hotbar (custom armor icons not from the pack): 

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de4d9344be34a2d131795bf06bc23d24a8672c6d.png)

Storage:

![storage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5715c7b17b436acc18fb6e4dbd0ac3432b210bd5.png)

I liked the original pack that tmc249 made, but it was too bright and colourful. So I decided to tone down the vibrancy of certain inventories and make the standard UI dark to ease eye strain.

I do not claim any ownership over the fantastic work the author did, I'm simply putting something out that some people might like.
